faq.question: Can I download Instagram reels without installing an app?
faq.answer: Yes! FastVidl is 100% browser-based. Simply paste the reel link and download instantly on any device — no app installation, registration or setup required.

faq.question: Does FastVidl add watermarks to downloaded reels?
faq.answer: No! FastVidl delivers reels in their original form exactly as processed from Instagram. We never add extra logos, watermarks or branding of any kind.

faq.question: Is downloading Instagram reels legal?
faq.answer: Downloading your own reels or using content privately for personal use is generally safe and acceptable. However, redistributing others' reels without permission can violate copyright law and Instagram's Terms of Service. Always obtain creator permission before public or commercial use.

faq.question: Do I need an Instagram account or login to use FastVidl?
faq.answer: No! FastVidl only requires the public reel link. We never ask for passwords, logins or account access of any kind. Your Instagram credentials remain completely private.

faq.question: Will the reel creator know I downloaded their content?
faq.answer: No! Downloading reels through FastVidl does not notify creators. However, if you repost or share the content publicly, the original Instagram watermark will show who created it.

faq.question: Can I download private or restricted Instagram reels?
faq.answer: No! FastVidl prioritizes user security by following Instagram's Community Guidelines. Our tool only accesses public Reels; we never ask for your login credentials or store your personal data on our servers.

faq.question: How long can Instagram reels be?
faq.answer: Instagram reels can be up to 3 minutes long for most accounts. FastVidl handles all reel lengths seamlessly, from short 15-second clips to full 3-minute videos.

faq.question: Is downloading Instagram reels safe and private?
faq.answer: Yes! FastVidl uses HTTPS encryption for all connections, processes only public links and doesn't store your downloads or personal data. We prioritize user privacy and security.

faq.question: Will the downloaded video maintain its original quality?
faq.answer: FastVidl preserves the exact quality that Instagram provides — typically up to 1080p for HD reels. If the original upload was low-resolution, the download cannot be upgraded beyond that source quality.

faq.question: Can I download entire Instagram profiles or channels at once?
faq.answer: No! FastVidl downloads individual reels one at a time. Bulk or automated downloading violates Instagram's Terms of Service and is not supported by our platform.

faq.question: Is there a daily download limit?
faq.answer: There's no strict daily limit on FastVidl, but excessive downloads may trigger Instagram's rate limiting protections. We recommend downloading responsibly for personal use.

faq.question: What happens if a reel is deleted from Instagram after I download it?
faq.answer: Once you've downloaded a reel to your device, you keep that file permanently regardless of what happens on Instagram. The video remains saved on your device even if the original post is deleted.

faq.question: Do I need to create an account?
faq.answer: No! FastVidl.com works immediately without any registration or login.

faq.question: Do downloads work on slow internet connections?
faq.answer: Yes, but processing time increases with slower connections. For best results, use a stable internet connection.

faq.question: Is there a file size limit?
faq.answer: We can process reels up to 4 hours in length. Individual file sizes vary based on quality and duration, but extremely large files (over 2GB) may experience slower processing.
